title: GREEN: implement core action registry and file operations
action: Implement the minimum Rust core code needed to pass Phase 2 core tests.
implementation: Add ActionDescriptor registry with ids copy.path, copy.real_path, copy.name, copy.parent_path, copy.shell_escaped_path, file.move_to_trash, file.delete_permanently, folder.create_from_filename, folder.dissolve, file.info.
Extend ActionRequest with confirmed_dangerous and ActionResult with optional JSON payload if tests require structured info.
Extend SRightConfig with DangerousConfirmationConfig defaulting to enabled true for dangerous action ids.
Implement copy variants as returned payload/message first; isolate actual clipboard writes behind a helper to keep tests deterministic.
Implement file.info from std::fs metadata and canonicalized path.
Implement create folder from filename by creating sibling folders named from selected file stems.
Implement dissolve folder by moving children to the folder parent and rejecting collisions.
Implement permanent delete only when confirmed_dangerous is true; implement move_to_trash behind a small helper boundary with temp-dir-testable behavior.
